# dysphagia.cn

> Multilingual dysphagia knowledge hub covering clinical assessment, nutrition, caregiving, and IDDSI standards. Available in Simplified Chinese (mainland China), Traditional Chinese (HK), Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), and English.

## Languages Available
- Simplified Chinese (zh-hans): /zh-hans/ — for mainland China readers
- Traditional Chinese HK (zh-hant-hk): /zh-hant-hk/ — for Hong Kong readers
- Traditional Chinese TW (zh-hant-tw): /zh-hant-tw/ — for Taiwan readers
- English (en): /en/ — for international readers

## Topic Categories
- Clinical assessment: screening tools, VFSS, FEES, manometry, geriatric dysphagia screening
- Nutrition: protein, micronutrients, texture-modified meals
- IDDSI standards: levels 0-7, testing methods, food mapping, yum cha ordering guide
- Conditions: stroke, Parkinson's, ALS/MND, dementia, head & neck cancer
- Caregiving: mealtime techniques, equipment, family support, community nursing, carer training, hospital discharge planning
- Recipes: soft Cantonese dishes, winter melon soft recipes, HK-adapted texture-modified cooking
- Standards: T/SATA, IDDSI, NHC guidelines, food safety

## zh-hant-hk Recent Articles (2026-05-09)
- /zh-hant-hk/clinical/hk-geriatric-assessment-dysphagia — 香港老年科評估中的吞嚥障礙篩查
- /zh-hant-hk/caregiving/hk-community-nursing-swallowing — 社區護理中的吞嚥護理技巧
- /zh-hant-hk/caregiving/hk-carer-training-programme — 香港照護者吞嚥培訓課程資源
- /zh-hant-hk/iddsi/iddsi-yumcha-ordering-guide — 飲茶點心的IDDSI友好點法指南
- /zh-hant-hk/caregiving/hk-hospital-discharge-planning — 出院後的吞嚥護理過渡計劃
- /zh-hant-hk/recipes/winter-melon-soft-recipes-hk — 冬瓜軟食食譜：香港本地適應版

## Related Sites
- softmeal.org — HK caregivers and professionals (Traditional Chinese + English)
- kangleling.com — Mainland China brand hub (Simplified Chinese)
- seniordeli.com — HK commercial products

## spatialCoverage
Primary: CN, HK, TW | Secondary: International
